warps.label: Greenhouse Floor

unlock_milestones.title: Greenhouse Repaired
unlock_milestones.text: The upper greenhouse seal finally yielded. The tower remembers how to grow things again.

warps.locked_note: The staircase seal hums. Complete 10 brews to reopen the greenhouse floor.

gather_nodes.name: Whisper Moss
gather_nodes.note: Soft growth near old stone and shaded mortar.

gather_nodes.name: Arcane Dust
gather_nodes.note: Residual powder that collects where old magic cracked.

gather_nodes.name: Sunleaf
gather_nodes.note: Bright leaves favor open patches near warm footpaths.

gather_nodes.name: Moon Fern
gather_nodes.note: Pale fronds glow best in low light near the grove.

gather_nodes.name: Ember Root
gather_nodes.note: Warm roots surface where old burn scars still hold heat.

gather_nodes.name: Mist Moth Wing
gather_nodes.note: Wing scales cling to reeds and bark after damp dusk flights.

gather_nodes.name: Glow Moth
gather_nodes.note: A living lantern moth that settles only where moonlight holds steady.

warps.label: Containment Floor

unlock_milestones.title: Containment Restored
unlock_milestones.text: The containment lift answers again. The tower is ready to shelter magical creatures instead of merely studying their remains.

warps.locked_note: The containment lift stays inert. The tower wants more proven alchemy before it trusts you with creatures.

gather_nodes.name: Cultivated Sunleaf
gather_nodes.note: A sheltered patch that keeps medicinal herbs alive between seasons.

gather_nodes.name: Glasshouse Moss
gather_nodes.note: Condensation and old wards make the greenhouse stones bloom softly.

gather_nodes.name: Dew Slug
gather_nodes.note: These gentle slugs gather where greenhouse glass sweats at dawn.

warps.label: Rune Workshop

unlock_milestones.title: Rune Workshop Restored
unlock_milestones.text: The rune benches hum again. Potions can now be reshaped after brewing instead of only before it.

warps.locked_note: The rune workshop remains shuttered until the tower trusts your handling of stranger forces.

warps.label: Archives
warps.locked_note: The archive vault remains sealed until you can prove the tower's higher work is stable.

warps.label: Portal Observatory
warps.locked_note: The observatory gate does not respond until the archive timeline is complete.

gathering_routes.name: Tower Ruin Edge
gathering_routes.description: A short route around the old tower walls where moss and residual dust collect.

gathering_routes.name: Creekside Meadow
gathering_routes.description: Sunny verge and creekbank patches just outside town, reliable for beginner herb runs.

gathering_routes.name: Moonlit Grove
gathering_routes.description: A shaded forest route that rewards evening and misty gathering.

gathering_routes.name: Charred Hollow
gathering_routes.description: A warmer pocket of the forest where roots and mineral reagents surface near old fire scars.

gathering_routes.name: Greenhouse Walk
gathering_routes.description: A tiny cultivated loop that preserves a few reliable herbs inside the tower.

gathering_routes.name: Containment Ring
gathering_routes.description: Quiet habitat cells fitted for harmless magical specimens and renewable harvests.

gathering_routes.name: Archive Stack
gathering_routes.description: A sealed record hall where journals, floor logs, and theory notes can be reconstructed into one timeline.

gathering_routes.name: Observatory Span
gathering_routes.description: A high lens chamber that turns the tower's history into a final view rather than a weapon.

npcs.name: Mira
npcs.dialogue_start: You are the new tower alchemist, yes? Bring me one proper Healing Draught and I will start sending paying work your way.
npcs.dialogue_progress: Have you brewed that Healing Draught yet? I need something dependable, not one of those murky experiments.
npcs.dialogue_complete: That draught did exactly what I needed. Keep brewing like this and the whole square will know your name.

npcs.name: Rowan
npcs.dialogue_start: If the greenhouse wakes, I want proof the tower can still hold living specimens. Bring me a good Glow Potion.
npcs.dialogue_progress: A Glow Potion with real luminous carryover, not a leaking lantern accident.
npcs.dialogue_complete: That is cleaner work than I expected. The greenhouse might actually live again.

npcs.name: Mayor Elric
npcs.dialogue_start: The town remembers the tower more kindly than the records do. Show me a disciplined Stamina Tonic and we may speak of funding repairs.
npcs.dialogue_progress: A proper civic tonic needs to be reliable, not explosive.
npcs.dialogue_complete: Solid work. If you keep the tower useful, the town will keep the road to it open.

npcs.name: Ione
npcs.dialogue_start: The archives mention a starlit branch of the glow formula. If you can make it, I want to see the evidence myself.
npcs.dialogue_progress: I am still waiting for something refined enough to count as research.
npcs.dialogue_complete: There it is. A proper branching formula. The old notes were not exaggerating.

npcs.name: Brin
npcs.dialogue_start: If you want the greenhouse to stay open, keep the planters fed with rare specimens. The old beds hate neglect.
npcs.dialogue_progress: The planters wake slowly, but they do wake. Watch them by the day, not by the minute.
npcs.dialogue_complete: You are starting to treat the tower like a place instead of a ruin.

npcs.name: Lyra
npcs.dialogue_start: No cages. Only habitats. Bring the tower creatures gently and they will give what they can without fear.
npcs.dialogue_progress: A calm specimen is worth more than any carcass. Start with a Beastcalm Extract and I can stabilize the floor.
npcs.dialogue_complete: Good. The habitats are behaving like living rooms instead of traps now.

quests.title: A Proper First Draught
quests.description: Deliver 1 Fine-or-better Healing Draught to Mira with the restorative trait intact.

quests.title: Proof of Luminous Carryover
quests.description: Deliver 1 Excellent Glow Potion with the soft_glow trait to Rowan.

quests.title: Living Beds
quests.description: Deliver 1 Fine Glow Potion after the greenhouse opens so Brin can calibrate the expanded planter wards.

quests.title: Civic Tonic Trial
quests.description: Deliver 1 Fine Stamina Tonic with the quickstep trait to Mayor Elric.

quests.title: Archive Proof
quests.description: Deliver 1 Star Lantern Elixir to Ione so she can verify the branching formula.

quests.title: Board Order: Greenhouse Stock
quests.description: Supply 1 Glow Potion for a night watch patrol assigned to the reopened greenhouse.

quests.title: Board Order: Restorative Stash
quests.description: Supply 1 Healing Draught for the infirmary shelves.

quests.title: First Specimens
quests.description: Deliver 1 Beastcalm Extract so Lyra can tune the new habitat wards.

items.name: Whisper Moss
items.description: Soft moss that carries faint magical resonance.

items.name: Arcane Dust
items.description: Sparkling powder scraped from old alchemical fixtures.

items.name: Sunleaf
items.description: A warming herb favored by local healers.

items.name: Moon Fern
items.description: A pale frond that glows faintly in shaded groves.

items.name: Ember Root
items.description: A hot-blooded root used in energizing mixtures.

items.name: Mist Moth Wing
items.description: A cool, powdery wing scale suited to volatile brews.

items.name: Glow Moth
items.description: A docile lantern moth prized for the dust it sheds in calm habitats.

items.name: Dew Slug
items.description: A placid moisture-feeding slug that leaves behind a clear stabilizing slime.

items.name: Lumen Dust
items.description: Soft dust collected from a settled glow moth habitat.

items.name: Dew Slime
items.description: Clear, cool slime gathered from a well-kept dew slug habitat.

items.name: Starlight Shard
items.description: A polished splinter that stabilizes luminous reactions.

items.name: Splash Rune
items.description: Turns a potion outward into a quick burst.

items.name: Echo Rune
items.description: Coils a potion into a repeating aftereffect.

items.name: Delay Rune
items.description: Makes a potion wait a beat before releasing its effect.

items.name: Soothing Tonic
items.description: A weak but stable draught made from restorative residue.

items.name: Lantern Leak
items.description: An unstable glow brew that still sheds useful light.

items.name: Rush Draught
items.description: A rough stimulant salvaged from aggressive ingredients.

effects.description: Adds a brief burst of hurried motion.

items.name: Healing Draught
items.description: A reliable restorative made from common valley herbs.

effects.description: Restores the body and steadies the nerves.

items.name: Glow Potion
items.description: A shimmering draft that illuminates dark paths.

effects.description: Bathes the drinker in a pale lantern aura.

items.name: Star Lantern Elixir
items.description: A refined luminous brew with long-lasting crystalline glow.

effects.description: Creates a steadier lantern aura with little loss.

items.name: Beastcalm Extract
items.description: A quieting extract used to settle tower creatures and skittish magical fauna.

effects.description: Gives a soft halo that keeps habitats calm.

items.name: Splash Glow Potion
items.description: A glow potion rewritten to burst outward in a quick halo.

effects.description: Releases a wider lantern bloom on use.

items.name: Echo Healing Draught
items.description: A healing draught with a softer second pulse worked into it.

effects.description: Restores more vitality in an echoed wave.

items.name: Delayed Stamina Tonic
items.description: A stamina tonic held in reserve before it surges through the body.

effects.description: Builds into a longer, steadier rush.

items.name: Stamina Tonic
items.description: A sharp tonic that steadies breath and motion.

effects.description: Quickens movement and lightens the body.

items.name: Murky Concoction
items.description: The sort of result that explains why labels matter.

effects.description: A clinging magical residue that leaves you sluggish.

recipes.name: Healing Draught
recipes.description: Simple and dependable. The town would gladly buy it.
recipes.lore_note: The missing wizard marked this one as the baseline for all restorative work.

recipes.name: Glow Potion
recipes.description: Useful for cellar work, cave paths, and dramatic entrances.
recipes.lore_note: A proper glow brew should throw light without setting your eyebrows on fire.

recipes.name: Stamina Tonic
recipes.description: Strong enough to feel illegal, but technically herbal.
recipes.lore_note: The formula trades elegance for force and should not be taken before sleep.

recipes.name: Beastcalm Extract
recipes.description: A containment tonic brewed from calm creature harvests.
recipes.lore_note: The old keeper preferred creature harvests that could be taken without distress.

rune_recipes.description: Reworks a glow brew into a wider, faster lantern discharge.
Threads a second restorative pulse through the draught.
Converts a sharp stimulant into a steadier delayed release.

room_bonus.description: The entry lab still holds enough old wards to steady restorative and luminous brews.
Sun-warmed glass and irrigation sigils make careful restorative work easier here.
